title: GridStatus CAISO Net Interchange Real Time
description:
Five-minute, real-time interchange in the West via CAISO data presented as a summarized view of flows between balacing authorities to enable easier BA-level analysis.

This view sums the MW values for each 5 minute interval for each unique pairing of from and to. This view does not contain individual ties. For tie-level data, refer to [caiso_tie_flows_real_time_5_min](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/caiso_tie_flows_real_time_5_min).
